The system exhibits several issues, including disobeying task specifications (agents not fully implementing requested functionality), weak verification (failing to catch errors in generated code), task derailment (proposing simplified implementations instead of addressing the core problem), information withholding (providing incomplete information), ignoring other agents' suggestions (continuing despite requests for clarification), premature termination (stopping tasks before completion), and step repetition (repeating the same thought or information). There are also instances of action-reasoning mismatch and loss of conversation history.
